description_long: This is a golden-brown, rectangular pastry with a flaky, layered exterior and a slightly glossy finish. The surface is uneven and textured, with visible folds and ridges characteristic of laminated dough. At both ends, there are dark, chocolate-like fillings peeking out, suggesting a pain au chocolat style. The pastry appears slightly puffed and airy, with a crisp outer crust and a softer, lighter interior. The coloration ranges from light tan to deeper amber, with some areas showing a subtle sheen from a possible egg wash. No visible toppings such as seeds or sugar are present on the surface.
description: A golden-brown, flaky rectangular croissant with chocolate filling at both ends and a slightly glossy, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the croissant's rounded, puffy top with two chocolate ends visible and a textured, flaky surface.
description_view_1: Back view highlights the smoother, less detailed underside with only one chocolate end slightly visible.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the spiral layering of the pastry and one prominent chocolate end protruding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the croissant's puffed top and both chocolate ends, with more pronounced surface folds.
